reviews.comment:
Estuve hace una semana una noche con mi esposo e hijito. Malísima la atención en el Hotel. Cuando me fui a quejar te tratan de mala manera y dicen que la dueña les dice que digan que si no nos gusta que dejemos la llave y nos vayamos... Se cortó la luz (a las 21hs todo oscuro mal) y no había luz de emergencia en ningún sector del Hotel!!!!!  ni siquiera velas!!!  Para que te den alguna información del servicio de Hotel hay que cruzar la ruta para ir a hablar con un playero (los que se encargan del hotel son los mismos que cargan nafta y venden en el kiosco) ya que dentro del complejo NO HAY NADIE PARA ATENDERTE ni siquiera alguien de seguridad. No hay teléfono para comunicarse con alguien del complejo. El desayuno incluido lo tomamos en la IPF cruzando la ruta con un chica limpiando con lavandina el piso. Todo horrible. NO LO RECOMIENDO EN ABSOLUTO!!!

(Translated by Google)
I stayed one night a week ago with my husband and young son. The service at the hotel was terrible. When I went to complain, they treated us rudely and said the owner told them to tell us that if we didn't like it, we should leave our keys and go away. The power went out (at 9 pm, it was pitch black) and there was no emergency lighting anywhere in the hotel! Not even candles! To get any information about the hotel services, you have to cross the road to talk to a gas station attendant (the people who run the hotel are the same ones who pump gas and sell it at the kiosk) because there is NO ONE inside the complex to help you, not even security. There's no phone to contact anyone at the complex. We had the included breakfast at the IPF across the road, where a girl was cleaning the floor with bleach. Everything was awful. I DO NOT RECOMMEND IT AT ALL!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJeFlPaDdBRRAB
